titleStmt.title: SII 9.452: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 452. (A.R. No. 429 of 1928.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A HOUSE-SITE SOUTH OF THE TANK CALLED DODDAKERE-KATTE AT BASRUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 13[7]3, Pramōda, Vaiśākha, śu. 13, Śukravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1450 April 24 Friday, in the reign of Mallikārjuna-Mahārāya. It states that, under the orders of the king, Liṅgapa-Oḍeya was ruling the Bārakūra-rājya and records that Kōṭeyaka-Nāyakitti, wife of Kōṭeya-Nāyaka, and her son, Meravaṇṇa-Seṭṭi made a gift of land and gold for the worship of gods and feeding some Brāhmans in the maṭha of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ nirvighnamastu .
namastuṁgaśiraḥcuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [*] svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1373
neya pramādasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu 13 śukravāradalū śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa mallikārjunamahārāya
rū vijayanagarada siṁhāsanadalirdu sakalasāmrājyava cittaisuva
kāladali Avara nirūpadiṁda liṁgapaOḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū
pratipālisutiha samayadalū naṁḍuhaḷiya Upinakuḷeyara baḷiya kōṭiyakanā
yakitti taṁna maga meravaṁṇaseṭi paḍuvakēṇali barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare �yo ma
ṭhakke barasida bāḷu Ānagaḷiya voḷage Ā bāḷu catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu dēvakaseṭi
tiya maṭhada bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu sālu sahita baḍagalu paḍuvalu be
kaḍeya kaḍuvina hoḷeyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catu
ssīmeyiṁda Oḷagaṇa kaḷiya bāḷu mēle maṭhada dharmakke naḍava Āki muḍi 41 .
Akṣāradalu hāne nālattaṟa lekkadali nālvatta Oṁdu muḍi tōṭa bāḷina mēle ma
ṭhake śanivāra yeṁṇe naḍava hoṁnu kāṭiga 10 bāḷiṁge teṟuva teṟu bārakūra
parivartanake saluva mayikāṭigaṁ �yo bāḷa Akiya Oḷage guṁmanāyakana dharma
�yo maṭhadali naḍavadu Oṁbage Āki muḍi 9 mattaṁ yi Ākiya Oḷage kōṭiyaka
nāyakitti taṁma maṭhada dēvapūjege māḍida Ākki muḍi 9 teṟu hoṟatāgi śuddha Aki mu
ḍi 45 yī maṭhake nāgaṁṇahgeḍe guṁmaṇahgeḍe yibara chatrake māḍida bāḷina vivara
kanyānada nāraṇahebārana kayyali Āruvārava hiḍida bāḷu kabbayala Oḷage bayalu gade
Oṁdakaṁ bittuvadu nālvattarali mu 9 mane malagade Anubha sahita yī bāḷa gēṇi Akki nālvaṁḍeyalu
mu 5 ge teṟiṁge Akki mu 7 nuḷiye śuda Akki mu 20 �yo bāḷalardha baṁdarū vritti baṁdarū
�yo maṭhakke taṁmuvaḍaha �yo maṭhadali Obbana dharmava māḍidadake bāḷu Ānagaḷiya vaḷa
ge taṁma mūlada bāḷa catussīmeya vivara baḍagalu harida sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu mūḍakaraya ga
ḍiyiṁda paḍavalu nāraṇasabāyitana gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu mitāṁtakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁda mū
ḍalu �yo catussīmeyiṁda Oḷage bituva bāḷu nālvaṁḍeyalu mu 3 hā 30 mataṁ catusīme
ya vivara nālkugaḍiŪ kāraṁtakaḷa gaḍi �yo catussīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuvadu hā 30 Ā mu
vatu hāne gadeya baḍagaṇa hāḷi bituvadu hā 10 Ā mūvatu hāne gadeyiṁda teṁka
ṇa hāḷi bituvadu hā 20 Aṁtu bituvadu mu 5 hā 10 �yo bāḷiṁge teṟu harūra hadima
ne bhāga hā 60 rettareya hadiyalu 1 Osari teru �yo teranu tettu yā Obbana dharmakke kālakā
lakke naḍasuva Aki muḍi 9 mattaṁ nāraṇanāyaka māḍi Obana dharmake Ānagaḷiya kaḷi
ya bāḷu muṁna barada nālku gaḍiya bāḷa mēle kālakālake nālvaṁḍeyalu Akki mūrḍe
muṁna barada Aki mūḍe 41 Ubhayada Ā bāḷa mēle Akki mūḍe 50 Aṁgirasasaṁvatsarada
bēsageya tiṁgaḷu modalāgi paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭṭikārarū kōṭe
yakanāyakitiya kayyalū kaḍaṁgoṁḍadu bārakūra parivartanake salu
va kāṭiga 200 Akṣāradalu yiṁnūru honu �yo honniṁge baḍḍi prativaru
ṣa 1 ke nālvaṁḍeyalu Akki muḍi 13 Oḷage mudeseṭiya dharmake Aki
muḍe 3 nuḷiye kōṭeyakanāyakitiya maṭake naḍasuva Aki mu 10 yī
hatu muḍe Akiyanū kālakālake naḍasuvaru �yo Artta baṁdarū vritti baṁdaru
�yo maṭhada dharmmake . �yo maṭhadali honneyāḍa māḍida Obbana dharmmada
bāḷina catussīmeya vivara jaḍukāruvayala Oḷage mūḍalu honeyā
(yā)ḍana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu kuṁṭeya hoḷeyiṁda baḍagalu . hari
da hoḷeyiṁda paḍuvalu honeyāḍana gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catu
sīmeyiṁda Oḷage hosamaneya nāraṇa bittuva bāḷu sarvvasvada mēle hattu mū
ḍe Akkiyanu kālakālake A nāraṇanu Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍasi bahanu
mattaṁ Anagaḷiya kaḷiya tōṭada mēle kārtikamāsake naṁdādīvige kāṭiga 1
. Ākaḷiya bāḷa mēle Amāvāse dvādasige dōsege Udu mu 1 A
ki mu 1 �yo maṭhadali Uṁba brāhmaru dēvapūje saha 11 �yo maṭhake
Aki mu 99 . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāsvargamavāpnō
ti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēditi vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭha
varuṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śubhamastu śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.452 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
